npcs.name: Dr Maya Chen
npcs.title: Ocean scientist
npcs.lore: Researching nano and microplastic accumulation in trophic chains.

npcs.name: Captain Elias Torres

npcs.lore: Coordinates autonomous trawlers that recover floating plastic islands.

npcs.name: Lina Park
